subcodes.first_line: O ye remnants of that sanctified soul! From the highest celestial heights that pure spirit gazeth upon you from the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بقایای ان نفس مقدس آن جان پاک از اوج اعلای افلاک در ملکوت ابهی ناظر بشماست
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for martyrs, @knowledge; recognition of God, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation
